MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Andrew Ford, Esq. of Gordon and Wong, 650-583-9399 for petitioner and moving party Chase Manhattan Bank U.S.A.
Robert Encarnacion, 415-734-0801, defendant and opposing party appearing propria persona

RULING:
MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
PLAINTIFF CHASE MANHATTAN BANK USA, N.A. AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO BANK ONE DELAWARE NA'S Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189. (301/PJB)
